traits.name: Multiattack
traits.desc: The ISK Hound makes 3 attacks: 1 Bite and 2 Swipe.

traits.name: Machine Combat
traits.desc: The ISK Hound gives into the orders without thinking. Their attacks are made with advantage, but attacks against them are also made with advantage until the start of their next turn.

traits.name: Aura of the Absolute
traits.desc: All allies within 30 feet that can see and hear the ISK Hound have advantage on Wisdom and Charisma saving throws.

actions.name: Swipe
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack; +7 to hit; reach 5 ft.; one target; 2d6+4 slashing damage.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack; +7 to hit; reach 5 ft.; one target; 1d8+4 slashing damage and 1d8 radiant damage.

actions.name: Laser Cannon (1/day)
actions.desc: The ISK Hound fires a 10-foot-wide, 30-foot-long line. Creatures must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or take 2d10 radiant and 2d10 fire damage, half on success.

bonus.name: Chase
bonus.desc: As a bonus action, the ISK Hound increases its movement by 20 feet until the end of its turn.

bonus.name: Tail
bonus.desc: Melee Weapon Attack; +7 to hit; reach 5 ft.; one target; 1d8+4 slashing damage.

name: Earl Makrevikk
resistances: necrotic, bludgeoning, piercing and shlashing from non-magical sources

traits.name: Multiattack
traits.desc: Earl makes three attacks as a part of an attack action, only one of which can be the Domain of the Damned.

traits.name: The Song of the Sea
traits.desc:
Earl is cursed by the powers of the Ghostsea and siphons a part of its power into himself. He starts combat with 3 Legendary Break Points and gains 2 at the start of each of his rounds.

When he is at 5 points or above his whip and eyes burn with a purple-bluish flame and his gaze and smile become feral.

He can spend them as normal Legendary Break Points or use a Dreadmaw for the cost of 6 Legendary Break Points.

actions.name: The Vein
actions.desc:
Melee weapon attack: +7 to hit, reach 20ft., one target, 1d4+4 slashing and 1d4 necrotic.

This vein looking whip has a devastating effect upon its victims, who can be seen having their flesh falling off and necrosis overtake them - it deals an additional 1d4 of necrotic damage and its range is doubled. When attuned it can be stowed away in user's body mimicking a normal vein. In this state it cannot be found by a spell of 5th level or lower.

bonus.name: The Marking (Recharge 6 each)
bonus.desc:
As a bonus action Earl Makrevikk may use one of 4 marks, each having different effects:
  • Mark of the Bold - The creature within 30 feet of Earl Makrevikk receives the mark, that allows them to attack a creature one additional time, when they attack a creature.
  • Mark of the Shield - The creature receives a mark, that gives them +2 AC for the next minute.
  • Mark of the Flame - The target is marked with a mark of the flame, that makes their attack deal additional 2d8 fire damage until the end of the Earl next round.
  • Mark of the Wind - Target creatures gains additional 10 feet of walk speed for the next minute.

bonus.name: Tail
bonus.desc: Melee Weapon Attack; +7 to hit; reach 5 ft.; one target; 1d8+4 slashing damage.
